item.label: [PKT-FND-013](task-0044): Exit Gate Validation
item.summary: Create exit gate validation for Phase 0

body:
# Description

Create exit gate validation for Phase 0.

# [PKT-FND-013](task-0034): Exit Gate Validation

## Purpose

Create exit gate validation for Phase 0.

## Scope

- Exit criteria
- Validation logic
- Reporting

## Implementation

1. Define exit criteria
2. Implement validation
3. Add reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. All exit criteria checked
2. Validation passes when complete
3. Reporting is clear
